title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering · Program Brief: Accessible Live Status
summary: Token deltas overwrite tool status, every chunk is announced, focus jumps, cancel is mouse-only, reconnect duplicates output, and color is the only failure signal. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the accessible live status increment in accessible typed agent event stream. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Announce meaningful milestones through restrained live regions, expose structured text, keep headings and focus stable, and avoid color-only meaning.
Assemble ordered deltas and state snapshots idempotently while preserving call, interaction, retry, and terminal boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

A defensible solution applies Accessible Live Status, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to accessible typed agent event stream.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_streaming_events_accessibility_4(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"

# Evidence: agentpy-accessible-live-status-13vckp
# Competency: agentpy-accessible-live-status.
# Case 9893: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_accessible_live_status_13vckp(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_13vckp = "13vckp-pkcv31-9893"
    assert evidence_variant_13vckp
    evidence_axes_13vckp = (
        "authority13vckp",
        "interaction9893",
        "toolpkcv31",
        "state13vckp9893",
        "evaluation989313vckp",
        "recoverypkcv319893",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_13vckp)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"
